description.zh-Hans: 减少每个颜色通道的色调级别数量，产生色调分离效果。可选择独立处理每个RGB通道，获得色彩偏移结果。
description.en: Reduces the number of tonal levels per color channel, creating a posterization effect. Can optionally posterize each RGB channel independently for color-shifted results.

triggers.zh-Hans: 色调分离, 减少色阶, 色阶压缩, 平化颜色
triggers.en: posterize, reduce levels, tone compression, flatten colors

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对图像应用色调分离，将颜色数量减少到8级。
exampleUsage.en: Apply posterization to an image, reducing colors to 8 levels.
